'''鈭歫-b-p''' ('''jabapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tweel|tweel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tweel|tweel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-b-p
|-
! Lemma
| jabapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jabapithi|jabapithi]] || [[word:jabapiji|jabapiji]] || [[word:jabapishi|jabapishi]] || [[word:jabapi|jabapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jabaputhuth|jabaputhuth]] || [[word:jabapujuj|jabapujuj]] || [[word:jabapushush|jabapushush]] || [[word:jabap|jabap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jabaputhu|jabaputhu]] || [[word:jabapuju|jabapuju]] || [[word:jabapushu|jabapushu]] || [[word:jabapu|jabapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jabapufuth|jabapufuth]] || [[word:jabapufuj|jabapufuj]] || [[word:jabapufush|jabapufush]] || [[word:jabapuf|jabapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jabapethe|jabapethe]] || [[word:jabapeje|jabapeje]] || [[word:jabapeshe|jabapeshe]] || [[word:jabape|jabape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jabapothoth|jabapothoth]] || [[word:jabapojoj|jabapojoj]] || [[word:jabaposhosh|jabaposhosh]] || [[word:jabap|jabap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jabapotho|jabapotho]] || [[word:jabapojo|jabapojo]] || [[word:jabaposho|jabaposho]] || [[word:jabapo|jabapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jabapofoth|jabapofoth]] || [[word:jabapofoj|jabapofoj]] || [[word:jabapofosh|jabapofosh]] || [[word:jabapof|jabapof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jabap茂f|jabap茂f]] || [[word:jabap茂f|jabap茂f]] || [[word:jabap茂f|jabap茂f]] || [[word:jabap茂f|jabap茂f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jabap茂f茂f|jabap茂f茂f]] || [[word:jabap茂f茂f|jabap茂f茂f]] || [[word:jabap茂f茂f|jabap茂f茂f]] || [[word:jabap茂f茂f|jabap茂f茂f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jabap茂f|jabap茂f]] || [[word:jabap茂f|jabap茂f]] || [[word:jabap茂f|jabap茂f]] || [[word:jabap茂f|jabap茂f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jabap茂f|jabap茂f]] || [[word:jabap茂f|jabap茂f]] || [[word:jabap茂f|jabap茂f]] || [[word:jabap茂f|jabap茂f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jabap忙th忙|jabap忙th忙]] || [[word:jabap忙j忙|jabap忙j忙]] || [[word:jabap忙sh忙|jabap忙sh忙]] || [[word:jabap忙|jabap忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jabapathath|jabapathath]] || [[word:jabapajaj|jabapajaj]] || [[word:jabapashash|jabapashash]] || [[word:jabap|jabap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jabapatha|jabapatha]] || [[word:jabapaja|jabapaja]] || [[word:jabapasha|jabapasha]] || [[word:jabapa|jabapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jabapafath|jabapafath]] || [[word:jabapafaj|jabapafaj]] || [[word:jabapafash|jabapafash]] || [[word:jabapaf|jabapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jabapasha|jabapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojabapasha|gojabapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijabapasha|gokijabapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jabapn眉sha|jabapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojabapnkn眉sha|gojabapnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijabapn眉sha|gokijabapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jabapsh毛sha|jabapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojabapnksh毛sha|gojabapnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijabapsh毛sha|gokijabapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jabaprosha|jabaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojabapnkrosha|gojabapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijabaprosha|gokijabaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jabapmusha|jabapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojabapnkmusha|gojabapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijabapmusha|gokijabapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jabapsherasha|jabapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojabapnksherasha|gojabapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijabapsherasha|gokijabapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jabapngasha|jabapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojabapnkngasha|gojabapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijabapngasha|gokijabapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jabapyasha|jabapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojabapnkyasha|gojabapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijabapyasha|gokijabapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jabapyamasha|jabapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojabapnkyamasha|gojabapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijabapyamasha|gokijabapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jabapn眉sh毛sha|jabapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojabapnkn眉sh毛sha|gojabapnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijabapn眉sh毛sha|gokijabapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jabapn眉rosha|jabapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojabapnkn眉rosha|gojabapnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijabapn眉rosha|gokijabapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jabapn眉musha|jabapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojabapnkn眉musha|gojabapnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijabapn眉musha|gokijabapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jabapsh毛n眉sha|jabapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojabapnksh毛n眉sha|gojabapnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijabapsh毛n眉sha|gokijabapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jabapsh毛rosha|jabapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojabapnksh毛rosha|gojabapnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijabapsh毛rosha|gokijabapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jabapsh毛musha|jabapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojabapnksh毛musha|gojabapnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijabapsh毛musha|gokijabapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jabapron眉sha|jabapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojabapnkron眉sha|gojabapnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijabapron眉sha|gokijabapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jabaprosh毛sha|jabaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojabapnkrosh毛sha|gojabapnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijabaprosh毛sha|gokijabaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jabapromusha|jabapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojabapnkromusha|gojabapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijabapromusha|gokijabapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jabapmun眉sha|jabapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojabapnkmun眉sha|gojabapnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijabapmun眉sha|gokijabapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jabapmush毛sha|jabapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojabapnkmush毛sha|gojabapnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijabapmush毛sha|gokijabapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jabapmurosha|jabapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojabapnkmurosha|gojabapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijabapmurosha|gokijabapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jabap|jabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:j忙b忙p|j忙b忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojabap|hojabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoj忙b忙p|hoj忙b忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojabap|hohojabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoj忙b忙p|hohoj忙b忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉jabap|n眉jabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉j忙b忙p|n眉j忙b忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉jabap|n眉n眉jabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉j忙b忙p|n眉n眉j忙b忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂jabap|n茂jabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂j忙b忙p|n茂j忙b忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂jabap|n茂n茂jabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂j忙b忙p|n茂n茂j忙b忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujabap|lujabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luj忙b忙p|luj忙b忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujabap|lulujabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluj忙b忙p|luluj忙b忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijabap|lijabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lij忙b忙p|lij忙b忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijabap|lilijabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilij忙b忙p|lilij忙b忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojabap|kojabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koj忙b忙p|koj忙b忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojabap|kokojabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoj忙b忙p|kokoj忙b忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejabap|kejabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kej忙b忙p|kej忙b忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejabap|kekejabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekej忙b忙p|kekej忙b忙p]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
